block.task_goal: Keep a bedroom door from closing due to drafts
block.expected_outcome: The door remains fixed in the open position and does not swing shut.
required_tool_attributes: rigid wedge geometry
high-friction contact surfaces
sufficient compressive strength
size matched to door gap
unconventional_tools: old sneaker or work boot (toe wedged under door)
opposite_tool_attributes: rounded or rolling, non-wedge geometry
low-friction, slippery contact surfaces
soft, easily deformed with low compressive strength

block.task_goal: Prevent a parked trailer from rolling on a sloped driveway
block.expected_outcome: The trailer stays stationary with its wheels immobilized.
required_tool_attributes: triangular profile to oppose wheel motion
high-friction base
high compressive strength
sufficient width to contact tire tread
unconventional_tools: Wedge cut from a 4x4 lumber offcut (wooden wheel wedge)
Triangular landscape edging stone or a large wedge-shaped rock
opposite_tool_attributes: rounded or cylindrical profile that promotes rolling instead of blocking
smooth, low-friction base that slides on pavement
low compressive strength or easily deformable under load

block.task_goal: Block a hallway to keep a dog from entering a room
block.expected_outcome: The gate spans the doorway and the dog cannot pass through
required_tool_attributes: rigid frame
adjustable width to span opening
secure latching mechanism
stable feet or pressure mounts
unconventional_tools: photography backdrop stand kit (telescoping crossbar with tripods)
folding fireplace screen with locking doors
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, floppy material with no rigid frame
fixed-width panel that cannot adjust to span the opening
no secure latch and lacks stable feet or pressure mounts (slides or tips easily)

block.task_goal: Fill a kitchen sink for soaking dishes
block.expected_outcome: Water is retained in the basin with no drain flow.
required_tool_attributes: impermeable material
snug, tapered fit to drain opening
structural stiffness to resist water pressure
grippable edge for placement and removal
unconventional_tools: partially inflated balloon inserted into the drain
opposite_tool_attributes: porous or absorbent material that allows water to pass through
loose, non-tapered shape that cannot form a seal with the drain opening
flimsy, collapsible structure that deforms under water pressure and won't hold position

block.task_goal: Stop a row of books from sliding over
block.expected_outcome: Books remain upright and do not slide when lightly pushed
required_tool_attributes: L-shaped rigid plate
weighted or broad base
non-slip bottom pad
sufficient height to contact book sides
unconventional_tools: L-shaped acrylic sign holder (countertop menu display)
Metal magazine file holder (upright desk organizer)
3-ring binder opened to a right angle
Pot-lid or cutting-board rack with rubber feet
opposite_tool_attributes: Soft, flexible, non–L-shaped form that collapses under load
Lightweight, narrow, top-heavy base that tips easily
Smooth, low-friction or wheeled bottom that slides or rolls on the shelf

block.task_goal: Stop a car from overrunning a parking spot
block.expected_outcome: The vehicle tires contact the curb and cannot advance further.
required_tool_attributes: rigid, high-compressive-strength body
anchoring spikes or bolts
sufficient height to meet tire
base friction and footprint stability
unconventional_tools: Pressure-treated 6x6 timber (railroad tie) anchored with rebar spikes
Concrete landscape edging blocks pinned with rebar or concrete anchors
Concrete masonry unit (cinder block) laid flat and bolted to the slab
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, deformable, low-compressive-strength body that collapses under tire load
unanchored, low-friction or rolling base that slides or moves instead of resisting
ultra-low-profile or tapered shape that fails to meet the tire and allows climb-over

break.task_goal: Crack open a coconut to access the water and flesh
break.expected_outcome: The coconut shell fractures and splits open, exposing the liquid and white flesh inside
required_tool_attributes: heavy head to deliver high-impact force
hard steel face to resist deformation
small striking surface to concentrate stress
rigid handle for controlled swinging
opposite_tool_attributes: lightweight, compressible head that absorbs impact instead of delivering it
soft, wide, cushioned striking surface that spreads force
flexible or floppy handle/tether that prevents controlled swinging

break.task_goal: Crack open a walnut to extract intact nutmeat
break.expected_outcome: The shell breaks while the kernel remains mostly whole and retrievable
required_tool_attributes: hard opposing jaws to compress the shell
levered pivot for mechanical advantage
rigid frame that resists flexing
textured grips to prevent slipping
opposite_tool_attributes: Soft, compressible jaws instead of hard opposing jaws
No levered pivot (elastic/stretch-based action without mechanical advantage)
Flexible frame that bends under load instead of staying rigid

break.task_goal: Shatter a car side window to escape during an emergency
break.expected_outcome: The tempered glass fractures into small cubes, creating an exit opening
required_tool_attributes: hardened pointed tip to focus impact
sufficient head mass for impulse delivery
ergonomic, non-slip grip
spring-loaded striker or rigid hammer head for sudden force
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, rounded blunt tip that disperses impact instead of focusing it
very low-mass, compressible head that absorbs energy rather than delivering impulse
slippery, flexible handle that reduces grip and bends instead of transferring force

break.task_goal: Break apart a frozen block of ground meat for cooking
break.expected_outcome: The frozen mass fractures into smaller chunks that thaw and cook evenly
required_tool_attributes: flat or textured striking face to distribute or focus impact
food-safe, corrosion-resistant head
sufficient head mass for effective impacts
rigid handle for energy transfer
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, compressible, non-flat striking surface that absorbs impact instead of delivering it
reactive, corrosion-prone or non-food-safe head material
very low head mass with a flexible or limp handle that bends and dissipates energy

break.task_goal: Break large compacted soil clods when preparing a garden bed
break.expected_outcome: Soil clods fracture into finer particles suitable for planting
required_tool_attributes: hardened pick end to concentrate force
heavy head for momentum
long rigid handle for swing energy
durable head-to-handle attachment
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, blunt, or cushioned striking end that disperses impact
ultra-lightweight or hollow head with very low mass
short, flexible, or limp handle that bends and absorbs swing energy

break.task_goal: Shatter a sheet of brittle toffee for dessert garnish
break.expected_outcome: The toffee breaks into decorative shards of various sizes
required_tool_attributes: flat, smooth striking face to control fragment size
sufficient head mass to exceed brittle strength
rigid handle for precise impacts
food-safe construction
unconventional_tools: heavy-bottomed small saucepan used bottom-first as a striker
ceramic mug held by the handle, using its flat base
glass measuring cup with handle, using the flat bottom
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, cushioned, or irregular/spiked striking surface instead of a flat, smooth face
ultra-lightweight or hollow/air-filled head that cannot deliver sufficient impact
flexible or floppy handle that bends and absorbs force rather than remaining rigid

break.task_goal: Fracture a CD/DVD before disposal to prevent data recovery
break.expected_outcome: The disc cracks and splits into multiple pieces, rendering data unreadable
required_tool_attributes: rigid, hardened jaws for strong clamping
screw mechanism to apply high compressive force
stable base to resist movement
parallel jaws to apply even stress
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, compliant jaws that deform instead of rigid, hardened jaws
elastic or friction-only holding instead of a screw mechanism to apply compressive force
unstable base and non-parallel/curved contact surfaces that apply uneven stress

break.task_goal: Crush a garlic bulb to separate cloves quickly
break.expected_outcome: The bulb's base plate fractures and cloves separate for peeling
required_tool_attributes: wide, rigid blade to spread impact
sufficient mass for a decisive strike
flat surface to apply compressive load
sturdy handle for safe control
unconventional_tools: small cast-iron skillet (use the flat bottom)
sturdy ceramic mug (flat base and handle)
opposite_tool_attributes: narrow, flexible edge that bends instead of a wide, rigid blade
very light, soft, or compressible material that absorbs impact instead of providing mass
rounded or cushioned contact surface with no flat face and no sturdy handle for control

break.task_goal: Open a fishing hole by breaking lake ice near the shore
break.expected_outcome: The ice fractures and a hole is created through successive strikes
required_tool_attributes: heavy, hardened chisel tip to penetrate ice
long shaft for swing and reach
non-slip grip for control
rigid, one-piece construction
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, rounded, deformable tip that cannot cut or chip ice
short, flexible shaft that bends and lacks reach/mass
flexible, jointed or telescoping, multi-piece body that deflects on impact

carry.task_goal: Carry six grocery bags from the car to the kitchen in one trip
carry.expected_outcome: All groceries arrive intact in the kitchen without tearing bags or dropping items
required_tool_attributes: reinforced dual handles for load support
tear-resistant fabric with high-friction exterior
flat semi-rigid bottom insert to stabilize the center of mass
gusseted sides that prevent shifting
unconventional_tools: car trunk organizer with carry handles
collapsible fabric laundry basket with reinforced handles
plastic storage bin with side handles
opposite_tool_attributes: single, non-reinforced handle (or no handles) that stretches or tears under load
slick, tear-prone exterior material with low friction (e.g., thin plastic or satin)
floppy, rounded bottom with non-gusseted, collapsing sides that allow contents to shift

carry.task_goal: Carry a laptop, charger, and notebook from a desk to a conference room
carry.expected_outcome: Electronics and documents arrive organized and undamaged at the meeting
required_tool_attributes: padded anti-slip shoulder strap for frictional grip and load distribution
semi-rigid frame panel to support weight
segmented compartments to prevent shifting
sturdy top handle to maintain balance during lifting
unconventional_tools: soft-sided insulated cooler bag with shoulder strap
electrician's tool tote with padded shoulder strap
opposite_tool_attributes: slippery, narrow, unpadded strap that slides off the shoulder and creates pressure points
flimsy, fully collapsible body with no semi-rigid support panel
single unpartitioned or open-mesh compartment that allows contents to shift or spill

carry.task_goal: Carry a hot casserole from the oven to the dining table
carry.expected_outcome: The casserole reaches the table upright without spills or burns
required_tool_attributes: rigid bottom tray to support the dish weight
zippered insulated lid that secures and stabilizes contents
wide heat-resistant handles with textured grip
non-slip interior surface to reduce sliding
unconventional_tools: insulated grocery cooler tote with rigid base insert
opposite_tool_attributes: flexible, sagging bottom with no rigid support
open, unfastened, non-insulated top that doesn't secure contents
narrow, heat-conductive, slick handles or no handles

carry.task_goal: Carry a car battery from the parts counter to a vehicle in the parking lot
carry.expected_outcome: Battery is moved without slipping, tilting, or straining the carrier
required_tool_attributes: acid-resistant strap with textured underside for frictional grip
clamp or cam mechanism that secures under battery lips
central rigid handle to keep the load balanced
sufficient load rating for heavy batteries
unconventional_tools: Heavy-duty ratchet tie-down strap with S-hooks and a short pipe as a central handle
5-gallon HDPE bucket with metal bail (battery placed inside)
Plastic milk crate with hand holes and a rubber mat liner
opposite_tool_attributes: smooth, non-textured, acid-absorbent strap material that degrades on acid contact
no under-lip securing mechanism (relies only on friction, magnets, or suction)
no central rigid handle; floppy/off-center flexible grip with low load rating
impossible_tools: magnetic lifting clamp (battery case is non-ferrous plastic)

cut.task_goal: Slice a loaf of crusty sourdough for sandwiches
cut.expected_outcome: Even slices are produced without crushing the loaf, ready for making sandwiches
required_tool_attributes: long serrated edge to concentrate stress on tough crust
thin, sharp bevel to minimize drag
rigid blade to prevent flex during sawing
ergonomic handle for controlled shearing force
opposite_tool_attributes: smooth, short, dull edge with no serrations that spreads force over the crust
thick, blunt bevel that increases drag and crushes the crumb
flexible, floppy blade that bends under load and wanders during sawing

cut.task_goal: Cut vinyl aquarium tubing to a precise length
cut.expected_outcome: Tubing ends are square and clean, ensuring a tight, leak-free fit
required_tool_attributes: curved, sharp blade to focus shear on soft tubing
rigid anvil jaw to oppose cutting force
aligned pivot for consistent edge contact
non-flexing handles for steady pressure
opposite_tool_attributes: dull, flat or flexible edge that spreads force instead of a curved, sharp blade
soft, compressible opposing surface that deforms under load instead of a rigid anvil jaw
loose, misaligned pivot and bending handles that flex and twist under pressure instead of aligned, non-flexing linkage

cut.task_goal: Open a sealed cardboard box by cutting the packing tape
cut.expected_outcome: The tape splits and the box flaps release open
required_tool_attributes: replaceable, razor-sharp blade
rigid blade support to prevent wobble
narrow tip to initiate the cut
ergonomic handle for safe, steady pressure
opposite_tool_attributes: blunt, rounded edge made of soft material (non-razor, non-replaceable)
flexible or wobbly blade support that bends under pressure
bulky, rounded tip with a slippery or absent handle

cut.task_goal: Remove a damaged section of carpet for patching
cut.expected_outcome: The damaged area is cut out cleanly along the pile direction with minimal fraying
required_tool_attributes: hooked, replaceable sharp blade to engage fibers
rigid handle to apply controlled force
thin cutting edge to concentrate shear
secure blade clamp to prevent flex or slip
unconventional_tools: safety box opener with concealed hook blade
opposite_tool_attributes: blunt, rounded non-hooked edge that cannot catch or sever fibers
flexible, compressible handle that bends or collapses under load
loose, non-locking blade mount that allows wobble, flex, or slip

cut.task_goal: Trim printed handouts to final size for a meeting
cut.expected_outcome: Stacks of paper are cut to consistent, clean edges matching the target dimensions
required_tool_attributes: long, sharp guillotine blade for shearing through stacks
rigid base and anvil edge for opposing force
levered pivot to amplify cutting force
paper clamp to prevent sheet shift during shear
unconventional_tools: rotary pizza cutter guided by a metal ruler on a cutting mat (stack held with binder clips)
large kitchen cleaver against a wooden cutting board with a straightedge fence (stack clamped with spring clamps)
kitchen mandoline slicer using its hand guard as a paper clamp and the bed as the anvil base
opposite_tool_attributes: short, dull, flexible edge that bends instead of a long, sharp guillotine blade
soft, compressible base with no rigid anvil edge to oppose the cut
no pivoted lever or mechanical advantage; requires direct, unamplified force

cut.task_goal: Cut a ribeye steak into bite-sized pieces at the table
cut.expected_outcome: The steak is portioned cleanly without tearing the meat fibers
required_tool_attributes: sharp fine or micro-serrated edge to shear cooked fibers
rigid, narrow blade for precise cuts
pointed tip to initiate cuts
hard steel to sustain a sharp edge
unconventional_tools: utility knife (box cutter) with a fresh blade
opposite_tool_attributes: dull, rounded edge with no serration
flexible, wide blade that lacks rigidity and precision
soft, low-hardness material that cannot hold a sharp edge

filter.task_goal: Drain cooked spaghetti from boiling water
filter.expected_outcome: Water rushes into the sink while the spaghetti stays in the colander
required_tool_attributes: bowl-shaped perforated body
holes smaller than pasta
heat-resistant material
rigid frame with handles
unconventional_tools: folding metal steamer basket (petal steamer insert)
perforated stainless-steel fruit bowl with side handles
opposite_tool_attributes: solid, non-perforated surface instead of a perforated bowl
openings larger than spaghetti strands (lets pasta fall through)
heat-sensitive, flexible body without rigid handles
impossible_tools: wire cooling rack or grill grate

filter.task_goal: Brew a clean pour-over coffee by separating grounds from the brew
filter.expected_outcome: Clear, sediment-free coffee drips into the mug while grounds remain in the filter
required_tool_attributes: microporous cellulose fibers with pores smaller than coffee grounds
conical shape to seat in dripper and promote directed flow
wet strength to resist tearing in hot water
edge sealing against dripper walls to prevent bypass
unconventional_tools: High-strength paper towel folded into a cone
Empty disposable paper tea filter bag lined in the dripper
Stacked paper cupcake liners pressed into a cone
opposite_tool_attributes: macroporous or perforated material with pores larger than coffee grounds, allowing solids to pass
flat or non-conforming shape that cannot form a cone or seat in a dripper, causing undirected flow
low wet strength or soluble material that tears/disintegrates in hot water and cannot maintain an edge seal (bypass)

filter.task_goal: Clarify used frying oil by removing burnt crumbs and batter bits
filter.original_tool: fine-mesh metal sieve lined with paper towel
filter.expected_outcome: Clean oil flows into the container while food particles are trapped in the liner
required_tool_attributes: heat-resistant metal mesh to support the liner
absorbent, porous paper with smaller pores than crumbs
rigid rim and handle to hold steady over a pot
sufficient open area to maintain oil flow rate
unconventional_tools: stainless-steel splatter screen lined with a coffee filter or paper towel
folding metal steamer basket lined with paper towel or brown paper, set over the pot
stainless-steel canning funnel lined with a paper coffee filter
opposite_tool_attributes: heat-sensitive plastic or nylon mesh that softens or melts in hot oil
non-porous, non-absorbent liner that blocks oil flow (e.g., plastic film)
flimsy, rimless form with no handle that collapses under the oil's weight

filter.task_goal: Make Greek yogurt by straining whey from plain yogurt
filter.expected_outcome: Thickened yogurt remains in the cloth while whey drains into the bowl
required_tool_attributes: woven cotton with micron-scale pores to retain milk solids
food-safe and non-reactive material
high tensile strength when wet
flexible fabric to form a hanging pouch for drainage
unconventional_tools: Pre-washed 100% cotton T-shirt (used as a straining cloth)
Stacked paper coffee filters placed in a colander
opposite_tool_attributes: non-porous/impermeable material that prevents whey from draining
very coarse pore size (millimeter-scale holes) that allows milk solids to pass through
low tensile strength when wet, making it unable to support a hanging pouch of yogurt
impossible_tools: standard pasta colander with large holes

filter.task_goal: Sift flour to remove lumps and aerate before baking
filter.expected_outcome: Uniform, lump-free flour falls into the mixing bowl; larger clumps are retained
required_tool_attributes: fine stainless-steel mesh with uniform aperture
rigid frame to keep mesh taut
agitation mechanism to drive particles through
food-safe construction
unconventional_tools: reusable stainless-steel pour-over coffee filter cone
opposite_tool_attributes: solid surface or very coarse/irregular openings instead of a fine, uniform mesh
flexible, collapsible frame that lets the mesh sag instead of keeping it taut
no agitation mechanism or a sealed design that traps flour rather than promoting flow

hammer.task_goal: Hang a framed photo by driving a small picture hook nail into drywall at an angle
hammer.expected_outcome: The hook sits flush and the nail is embedded securely in the wall
required_tool_attributes: weighted steel head for impulse
flat hardened striking face
rigid head-to-handle connection
short-to-medium handle for controlled swing
unconventional_tools: small hatchet/hand axe (use the flat poll)
heavy adjustable wrench (steel; strike with the broad flat jaw side)
short steel pry bar/wrecking bar (use the flat chisel end)
stainless-steel saucepan with riveted handle (strike with the flat base)
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, low-mass head (foam/rubber/inflatable) instead of weighted steel
rounded or compliant striking surface that absorbs impact (not flat/hardened)
flexible or loose head-to-handle joint with a long, whippy handle that reduces control

hammer.task_goal: Crack cooked crab claws cleanly for serving
hammer.expected_outcome: Shells crack open without pulverizing the meat or damaging the plate
required_tool_attributes: lightweight yet weighted head for controlled impulse
broad, rigid wooden striking faces for distributed force
non-marring material safe for tableware
rigid handle for swing control
unconventional_tools: wooden pepper mill (use the flat base as the striker)
wooden rolling pin (hold a handle and tap with the barrel/end)
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, compressible striking surface that absorbs impact instead of delivering it
narrow, sharp or abrasive edges that concentrate force and mar shells and tableware
flexible or limp handle that bends or flops, reducing swing control

hammer.task_goal: Pitch a tent by driving an aluminum stake into the ground
hammer.expected_outcome: The stake is driven to ground level and holds the guyline taut
required_tool_attributes: broad durable striking face
weighted head to deliver momentum
long handle for swing leverage
rigid construction for efficient force transfer
unconventional_tools: garden spade/shovel (using the back of the blade as the striking face)
cast-iron skillet or heavy frying pan (flat bottom)
pipe wrench (flat side of the jaw/head)
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, compressible striking face that deforms on impact
ultra-light, hollow head with minimal mass
short, flexible handle that bends and absorbs force

hammer.task_goal: Straighten a bent steel L-bracket on an anvil
hammer.expected_outcome: The bracket is flattened and reformed to a true right angle
required_tool_attributes: flat face for general strikes and cross-peen to localize force
hardened, rigid faces for effective metal deformation
balanced head for precise blows
sufficient mass for momentum transfer
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible, or shock-absorbing striking faces instead of hardened, rigid faces
no flat face or peen; rounded/spherical or knife-like edges that can't apply broad or linear localized force
extremely light, poorly balanced, or wobbly head/handle that prevents precise, high-momentum blows

loosen.task_goal: Loosen the tiny screw on an eyeglass arm hinge
loosen.expected_outcome: The hinge screw turns counterclockwise and the arm slackens slightly
required_tool_attributes: small precision Phillips tip
slim, rigid shaft
rotating cap or fine-control handle
non-slip grip for delicate torque
unconventional_tools: bobby pin (flattened end used like a tiny flathead)
mechanical pencil with lead retracted (metal nozzle used for purchase)
metal nail file from a manicure kit (pointed tip as driver)
opposite_tool_attributes: large, non-Phillips or rounded tip that cannot engage a tiny cross-slot
flexible or soft, bulky shaft that bends or can’t access the hinge
smooth, fixed handle with no rotating cap or fine-control grip

loosen.task_goal: Loosen a rusted hex nut on a backyard gate hinge to realign the gate
loosen.expected_outcome: The nut backs off counterclockwise, reducing clamping force so the hinge can be adjusted
required_tool_attributes: adjustable jaw sized to hex flats
parallel, flat jaws for full-face contact
rigid steel handle for torque transmission
ergonomic grip for applying reverse torque
low jaw play to prevent rounding
unconventional_tools: Small C-clamp tightened onto the nut and used as an improvised wrench
F-style bar clamp gripping the hex flats and turned as a handle
Locking pliers with stacked coin or washer shims to present parallel, flat jaws on the nut
opposite_tool_attributes: non-adjustable, wrong-sized or rounded/serrated jaws that aren’t parallel, giving only point contact
flexible or soft handle/body (rubber/plastic) that bends or deforms under torque instead of rigid steel
high jaw play/loose hinge tolerance causing sloppy fit and rounding of hex flats

loosen.task_goal: Loosen a stuck lid on a pickle jar
loosen.expected_outcome: The lid unscrews and the vacuum seal breaks, allowing the jar to open
required_tool_attributes: high-friction rubber surface
flexible pad that conforms to lid contours
sufficient diameter coverage for grip
enables strong hand-applied rotational force
unconventional_tools: wide rubber band(s) wrapped around the lid
opposite_tool_attributes: slick, low-friction surface (e.g., polished or lubricated)
rigid, non-conforming shape that cannot wrap around the lid
minimal contact area that fails to cover the lid’s diameter and distribute grip

pin.task_goal: Eject the SIM card from a phone
pin.expected_outcome: The SIM tray pops out slightly from the phone
required_tool_attributes: very narrow, rigid pin tip
straight, stiff shaft
small handle for grip
corrosion-resistant metal
opposite_tool_attributes: wide, rounded, flexible tip that deforms under pressure
floppy, curved shaft that cannot transmit push force
bulky, slippery handle or no handle for grip

pin.task_goal: Align and secure two fabric panels along a seam before stitching
pin.expected_outcome: The fabric layers are immobilized together along the seam line, preventing shifting while sewing
required_tool_attributes: sharp tapered tip to penetrate fabric with minimal force
rigid slender shaft to resist bending under thumb pressure
small head to concentrate applied pressure and stop pull-through
smooth surface to reduce snagging while maintaining frictional hold
unconventional_tools: cocktail picks (toothpicks with a small bulb head)
opposite_tool_attributes: blunt, non-tapered tip that cannot penetrate fabric
flexible or compressible shaft that buckles under thumb pressure
large, soft, or absent head that fails to stop pull-through and diffuses applied pressure

pin.task_goal: Affix a printed notice to a corkboard in an office hallway
pin.expected_outcome: The paper stays flat and secured to the board without sagging or falling
required_tool_attributes: sharp point to penetrate cork with minimal effort
rigid pin shaft to transmit localized force
broad head to apply thumb pressure safely
small cross-sectional area to achieve high insertion pressure
unconventional_tools: small wood screw (twisted in by hand)
opposite_tool_attributes: blunt or rounded tip with large contact area that cannot pierce cork
flexible or compressible shaft that bends instead of transmitting force
no head or a tiny/slippery head that prevents safe thumb pressure

pin.task_goal: Secure a tent corner to the ground in windy conditions
pin.expected_outcome: The tent remains anchored with the corner immobilized against wind forces
required_tool_attributes: pointed tip to pierce soil with localized force
rigid body to resist bending under tension
hooked or notched head to capture guyline
sufficient length to develop soil frictional hold
unconventional_tools: large metal barbecue skewer with loop handle
small pry bar with nail-puller hook
opposite_tool_attributes: blunt, rounded tip that spreads force and cannot pierce soil
flexible or soft body that bends, stretches, or compresses under tension
smooth, unnotched head with no hook to retain a guyline

pin.task_goal: Mount a smartphone securely on a tripod for steady video recording
pin.expected_outcome: The phone is immobilized in the clamp without slipping or wobbling
required_tool_attributes: small padded jaws to localize pressure and protect the device
spring or screw mechanism to apply and maintain clamping force
rigid frame to prevent flexing
textured pads to increase friction
unconventional_tools: mini C-clamp with added felt or rubber pads
heavy-duty binder clip with adhesive foam on jaws
small spring clamp (Pony-style) with rubberized pads
opposite_tool_attributes: smooth, unpadded contact surfaces that are slick and can scratch the device
no clamping mechanism (loose fit relying only on gravity or incidental friction)
flexible or elastic frame that bends or twists under load

press.expected_outcome: Garlic paste extrudes through the holes into a dish
required_tool_attributes: opposing rigid press plates/basket
hinged handles for leverage
small perforations to extrude garlic
sturdy pivot
unconventional_tools: handheld citrus squeezer (two-cup style with drain holes)
lever-style French fry cutter (grid die and push plate)
opposite_tool_attributes: Soft, flexible contacting surfaces with no opposing rigid press plates or basket
No hinge or leverage mechanism (single-piece, non-articulated or floppy form)
No small perforations for extrusion (either a solid face or large gaps that don't constrain garlic)

press.task_goal: Squeeze juice from a lemon half
press.expected_outcome: Fresh lemon juice flows into a cup while the rind compresses
required_tool_attributes: concave rigid press cups
hinged lever arms for mechanical advantage
corrosion-resistant material
drain slots/orifice
unconventional_tools: potato ricer (stainless steel, perforated cup press)
spaetzle press (perforated hopper with hinged lever arms)
garlic press (metal basket with drain holes)
perforated salad/serving tongs with spoon-shaped ends (stainless steel)
stainless steel tea infuser tongs (ball-style with perforations)
opposite_tool_attributes: flat or convex, flexible pressing surfaces instead of concave rigid press cups
no hinged lever action (one-piece, non-levered, floppy design) providing no mechanical advantage
sealed pressing surfaces with no drain slots/orifice to direct juice out

press.task_goal: Compact espresso grounds evenly in a portafilter
press.expected_outcome: A level, compressed coffee puck with consistent density is formed
required_tool_attributes: flat, rigid tamper base
diameter matched to basket for edge-to-edge pressure
ergonomic handle to apply vertical force
smooth face to prevent grounds from sticking
unconventional_tools: flat-bottomed shot glass or small rocks glass used upside-down
small spice jar with a flat, smooth base used upside-down
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible, or convex contact surface instead of a flat, rigid base
mismatched diameter (too small/too large) or irregular shape that can't reach edge-to-edge
no stable, ergonomic handle to apply controlled vertical force; awkward grip needed

press.task_goal: Remove wrinkles from a cotton shirt
press.expected_outcome: The fabric lies flat and smooth without creases
required_tool_attributes: smooth, rigid soleplate to distribute compressive load
sufficient weight to maintain contact pressure
ergonomic handle for additional downward force
heat-resistant structure to maintain rigidity under temperature
unconventional_tools: ceramic coffee mug filled with hot water (using the flat base)
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible, uneven contact surface that cannot distribute compressive load
extremely lightweight body with no ergonomic handle to apply downward force
heat-sensitive structure that warps or melts under moderate ironing temperatures

press.task_goal: Emboss an official seal on a document
press.expected_outcome: A crisp, raised seal impression appears without tearing the paper
required_tool_attributes: hardened male and female dies
lever mechanism for high localized pressure
rigid frame to prevent flex under load
registration guides for accurate placement
unconventional_tools: C-clamp with paired engraved steel washers acting as male/female dies and taped-on edge guides
Locking pliers (Vise-Grips) fitted with small matched die inserts and a simple registration jig
Garlic press outfitted with matching emboss plates and a corner-stop guide
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, unengraved contact surfaces instead of hardened mating dies
no lever or mechanical advantage; broad, diffuse, low pressure rather than high localized pressure
flexible, flimsy body without a rigid frame or registration guides, allowing flex and misalignment under load

pull.task_goal: Open a glass-front cabinet door whose handle snapped off without scratching the surface
pull.expected_outcome: The cabinet door is pulled open cleanly using the suction grip, with no damage to the glass
required_tool_attributes: high-friction rubber cup that forms a vacuum seal
rigid handle to transmit tensile force
locking lever to maintain suction under load
ergonomic, non-slip grip
unconventional_tools: windshield smartphone mount with suction cup and locking lever
suction-cup shower hook with lever lock
opposite_tool_attributes: smooth, low-friction, porous or vented contact surface that cannot form an airtight vacuum seal
limp, flexible linkage instead of a rigid handle to transmit tensile force
no locking mechanism and a slippery, non-ergonomic grip that slips under load

pull.task_goal: Uncork a wine bottle at a dinner party
pull.expected_outcome: The cork is pulled out intact, leaving the bottle ready to pour
required_tool_attributes: sharp helical worm to hook into the cork
lever fulcrum for controlled directional pull
rigid handle for tension transfer
textured grip for secure hold
opposite_tool_attributes: blunt, non-helical tip that cannot penetrate or bite into cork
flexible, floppy body with no lever fulcrum or rigid handle
smooth, slick grip surface that offers no traction

pull.task_goal: Zip up a jacket without a zipper pull tab
pull.expected_outcome: The zipper slider travels upward and the jacket closes
required_tool_attributes: small rigid tab for grip
firm linkage to slider
low-friction slider movement
finger-sized opening or textured surface
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible, or stretchy body that collapses under pull (not a small rigid tab)
loose, weak, or non-existent connection to the zipper slider (no firm linkage)
smooth, featureless surface with no hole or texture for fingers

reach.task_goal: Drag a tennis ball out from under a sofa
reach.expected_outcome: The ball is hooked by the blade and pulled into the open
required_tool_attributes: long rigid shaft
angled blade to catch and drag
stiffness to transmit pulling force
low-profile blade to fit under furniture
unconventional_tools: fireplace poker with a hooked end
opposite_tool_attributes: short, flexible or limp shaft that bends or collapses instead of reaching
rounded, smooth tip with no angled blade or hook to catch and drag the ball
bulky, high-profile, soft head that can’t fit under furniture or transmit pulling force

roll.task_goal: Flatten pie dough to an even thickness for a crust
roll.expected_outcome: Dough is uniformly flattened to the desired thickness without tearing
required_tool_attributes: smooth cylindrical surface for continuous rotational contact
rigid structure to maintain shape under pressure
low-friction rotation relative to hands or handles
sufficient mass to aid rolling with reduced sliding
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible, or compressible body that deforms under pressure
irregular, non-cylindrical, or textured surface that prevents smooth continuous contact
fixed or high-friction interface with hands that prevents low-friction rotation

roll.task_goal: Thin sheets of pasta to the final thickness for fettuccine
roll.expected_outcome: Pasta sheets are evenly thinned and emerge smooth and uniform
required_tool_attributes: parallel steel rollers with adjustable gap
smooth cylindrical surfaces to prevent sticking
crank-driven rotation for controlled feed
stable bearings for consistent rolling pressure
opposite_tool_attributes: non-parallel rollers with a fixed or uneven gap (no adjustability)
rough, sticky, serrated, or porous contact surfaces instead of smooth cylinders
no controlled rotational feed and loose, wobbly bearings causing inconsistent pressure

roll.task_goal: Press down wallpaper seams after hanging
roll.expected_outcome: Seams lie flat and adhere without visible ridges or bubbles
required_tool_attributes: narrow, smooth cylindrical wheel
slightly rounded edges to avoid cutting paper
rigid handle for precise pressure control
low-friction axle for smooth rolling
unconventional_tools: small toy car with smooth plastic wheels
empty thread spool on a pencil
opposite_tool_attributes: broad, flat, textured or sticky contact surface that does not roll
sharp, square, or serrated edges that can cut or tear the wallpaper
flexible/flimsy handle and a high-friction or fixed axle that drags instead of rolling

roll.task_goal: Self-massage tight calf muscles after running
roll.expected_outcome: Muscle tension is reduced through controlled rolling pressure
required_tool_attributes: cylindrical geometry for smooth body contact
firm, resilient foam with rigid core
sufficient diameter to maintain curvature under load
high-friction exterior to prevent unwanted sliding
unconventional_tools: stainless-steel water bottle with a silicone sleeve
pool noodle slid over a broomstick
opposite_tool_attributes: flat, flexible sheet-like geometry instead of a rigid cylinder
soft, collapsible material with no rigid core that deforms under body weight
slick, low-friction exterior that slides on skin or floor

scoop.task_goal: Move flour from a bag into a mixing bowl to start baking
scoop.expected_outcome: A measured cupful of flour is transferred into the bowl
required_tool_attributes: rigid concave cup to contain loose powder
defined volume capacity for measurement
flat leading rim to push into flour
handle for controlled scooping and pouring
unconventional_tools: 1-cup portion ladle (soup ladle with labeled capacity)
Flat-front pet food measuring scoop (1 cup)
Ice scoop with marked 8 oz (1 cup) capacity and flat leading edge
Protein powder scoop (30 mL) from supplement container
Coffee scoop (1 tablespoon) used repeatedly to total 1 cup
opposite_tool_attributes: flexible, non-concave surface that collapses instead of a rigid cup
perforated or mesh head that lets fine powder pass through rather than containing it
no handle or a slippery, tiny grip that prevents controlled scooping and pouring

scoop.task_goal: Portion ice cream into a serving bowl
scoop.expected_outcome: A rounded scoop of ice cream drops into the bowl
required_tool_attributes: deep hemispherical bowl for volume support
sturdy construction to resist bending in hard ice cream
sharp rim to cut through dense material
handle for leverage and control
unconventional_tools: 1/4-cup stainless steel measuring cup with handle
opposite_tool_attributes: flat or perforated surface instead of a deep hemispherical bowl
flexible, flimsy, or elastic construction that bends under pressure
dull, rounded edge with no cutting rim

scoop.task_goal: Serve soup from a pot into a bowl
scoop.expected_outcome: A ladleful of soup fills the bowl
required_tool_attributes: deep concave bowl for liquid containment
watertight surface
long handle to reach into the pot
heat-resistant material
unconventional_tools: small saucepan with a long handle
stainless steel ice scoop (solid, no perforations)
1-cup stainless steel measuring cup with long handle
borosilicate glass coffee carafe (drip coffee pot)
opposite_tool_attributes: flat, perforated, or convex head lacking a deep concave bowl
porous or absorbent surface that is not watertight
short, heat-sensitive handle/material that cannot withstand pot heat

scrape.task_goal: Remove peeling paint from a wooden windowsill before repainting
scrape.expected_outcome: Loose and flaking paint is lifted off, leaving a smooth, bare surface ready for primer

sturdy ergonomic handle for controlled force
sufficient blade width to cover surface
replaceable sharp blade
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible, rounded rubber edge (not a rigid, flat beveled steel edge)
flimsy, slippery handle that prevents controlled force
very narrow, non-replaceable, dull edge

scrape.task_goal: Remove a price sticker from a glass jar
scrape.expected_outcome: The sticker peels away cleanly, leaving a bare glass patch
required_tool_attributes: thin, stiff plastic edge
non-marring material
slight bevel to get under label
small form for curved surfaces
unconventional_tools: cut end of a nylon zip tie
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible, rounded surface with no thin edge
abrasive or sharp metal edge that can scratch/mar glass
bulky, oversized form without a bevel that can't fit under labels on curved jars

scrape.task_goal: Remove chewing gum stuck in a shoe sole
scrape.expected_outcome: The gum lifts out of the tread, leaving the sole visibly cleaner
required_tool_attributes: stiff, flat metal blade
square edge to push under gum
narrow width for tread channels
solid handle for leverage
unconventional_tools: paint can opener (church key pry tool)
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible or compressible head instead of a stiff, flat metal blade
rounded/curved or serrated edge instead of a square scraping edge

scrape.task_goal: Scrape candle wax drips off a wooden table
scrape.expected_outcome: Wax flakes away, revealing the wood finish beneath

non-scratch material
beveled front edge
grippable handle
unconventional_tools: expired plastic gift or hotel key card
plastic decal squeegee card (screen protector applicator)
opposite_tool_attributes: rounded, non-beveled leading edge that cannot slide under wax

scrape.task_goal: Remove burnt-on spills from a glass-ceramic cooktop
scrape.expected_outcome: Hardened residue is cleanly shaved from the glass without scratches

low-angle head to keep blade nearly flat
non-slip handle for delicate control
blade guard for consistent angle
unconventional_tools: Single-edge razor blade clamped in a medium binder clip (makeshift scraper with angle guard)
Utility knife blade embedded slightly into a thick rubber eraser to create a flat, grippy scraper
Old plastic gift/credit card used at a very low angle as a gentle scraper
opposite_tool_attributes: dull, flexible, rounded edge instead of a sharp, rigid blade

slick, handle-less grip with no blade guard or angle control

shake.task_goal: Blend protein powder with water for a post-workout drink

contoured, grippable exterior
adequate headspace for fluid movement

opposite_tool_attributes: unsealed or leaky opening (open top or perforated cap) that cannot contain vigorous shaking
soft, collapsible body that deforms and absorbs shaking energy
smooth interior with no internal agitator (no ball or baffles) to break clumps

shake.expected_outcome: A light, even dusting of salt falls over the fries
required_tool_attributes: perforated cap for controlled dispensing
rigid container body
dry granular contents free to flow
grippable shape for rapid oscillation
unconventional_tools: mason jar with perforated sprouting lid
opposite_tool_attributes: solid, non-perforated or sealed cap that prevents controlled sprinkling
flexible, collapsible container body that deforms when shaken
wet, clumped, or non-granular contents that do not flow freely

shake.task_goal: Evenly dust a cake with powdered sugar
shake.expected_outcome: A uniform, clump-free layer of powdered sugar over the cake
required_tool_attributes: fine mesh that releases powder under vibration
rigid frame to maintain mesh tension during shaking
handle for controlled oscillation
bowl-shaped cavity to hold powder while moving
light but sturdy construction for rapid motion

opposite_tool_attributes: solid, non-perforated surface that blocks powder instead of letting it pass

stab.task_goal: Puncture the shrink-wrap on a new electronics package to start opening it

rigid steel blade
ergonomic handle for controlled force
high hardness to resist tip deformation
opposite_tool_attributes: blunt, rounded, dull tip
flexible, soft blade/body that bends under pressure

stab.task_goal: Vent a microwave meal by piercing the plastic film cover

rigid stainless steel construction
insulated handle for safe grip
corrosion resistance for food contact
opposite_tool_attributes: blunt, rounded, non-tapered ends with no points

stab.task_goal: Make steam-vent holes in a pie crust

rigid metal construction
handle for downward force
small tip area
opposite_tool_attributes: broad, blunt, rounded surface with no points or tines
soft, flexible, compressible construction instead of rigid metal

stab.task_goal: Add a new hole to a leather belt for a better fit

rigid shaft that won’t flex
comfortable handle for controlled force
smooth, low-friction tip to pass through leather
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, blunt, rounded tip that deforms instead of piercing

stab.task_goal: Pop a decorative balloon for cleanup after a party

rigid steel wire
small head for precise handling
low diameter to concentrate stress
opposite_tool_attributes: blunt, rounded tip with high diameter that disperses force
soft, flexible material that bends/compresses instead of remaining rigid
large, padded head that reduces precision and cushions impact

sweep.task_goal: Clear sawdust off a woodworking bench into a waste bin
sweep.expected_outcome: Loose sawdust is gathered along the bench edge and swept into a bin, leaving a clean work surface

rigid brush spine to distribute force evenly
hand-sized handle for precise strokes
slightly compliant bristle tips to conform to minor surface irregularities
opposite_tool_attributes: sparse, long, floppy bristles that scatter fine dust
flexible or limp spine/backing that cannot distribute force evenly
overly stiff, non-compliant bristle tips that won’t conform to minor surface irregularities

sweep.task_goal: Gather wet leaves on a front porch into a pile for bagging
sweep.expected_outcome: Leaves are moved into a manageable pile without clogging, ready for pickup
required_tool_attributes: extra-wide head for high-coverage sweeping
stiff, water-resistant bristles to move clumped leaves
rigid block to transfer distributed force across the head
long handle for leverage over rough outdoor surfaces
unconventional_tools: storefront window squeegee with extension pole
rubber boot-scraper doormat strapped to a long handle as a pusher
opposite_tool_attributes: narrow, small head with minimal contact area
soft, water-absorbent fibers that collapse when wet
flexible or floppy head that cannot transmit force across its width

sweep.task_goal: Push standing water across a garage floor toward a floor drain
sweep.expected_outcome: Water is driven in a consistent sheet toward the drain, leaving the floor largely dry
required_tool_attributes: continuous flexible rubber blade for edge-to-surface seal
rigid channel to maintain uniform pressure along the blade
wide head for efficient coverage
long handle to apply even, distributed force
opposite_tool_attributes: bristled or porous contact edge that cannot form a continuous seal with the floor
floppy, flexible head without a rigid channel, causing uneven pressure along the edge
narrow head with a short or no handle, limiting coverage and preventing even, distributed force

sweep.task_goal: Remove fresh snow from a car windshield toward the hood before driving
sweep.expected_outcome: Windshield and wipers are cleared of loose snow, improving visibility
required_tool_attributes: wide foam head or soft bristles for broad contact without scratching
cold-resistant materials to remain flexible in low temperatures
long handle for reach across the windshield
slight head compliance to follow glass curvature
unconventional_tools: sponge mop (foam head) with long handle
foam paint roller on an extension pole
opposite_tool_attributes: narrow, hard, abrasive edge that scratches glass instead of a wide soft contact surface
materials that become stiff or brittle in cold temperatures, losing flexibility or cracking
short, non-extendable handle with a rigid, non-compliant head that can’t reach or follow windshield curvature

sweep.task_goal: Clean accumulated chalk dust from a whiteboard tray into a waste bin
sweep.expected_outcome: Chalk particles are consolidated and removed, preventing dust spread
required_tool_attributes: narrow head for tray-sized strokes
stiff-but-flexible bristles for powdery debris
rigid spine for uniform sweeping pressure
slightly angled head for edge contact
opposite_tool_attributes: overly wide, bulky head that cannot fit within the tray
ultra-soft, floppy bristles that collapse under light pressure
limp, flexible spine that bends instead of applying uniform pressure

tighten.task_goal: Stop a small leak by tightening a worm-drive hose clamp on a dishwasher drain hose
tighten.expected_outcome: The hose is compressed uniformly around the fitting and no water drips occur
required_tool_attributes: nut driver tip sized to the clamp screw
long, rigid shaft to reach recessed clamps
ergonomic handle for higher torque
non-slip surface to maintain grip with wet hands
unconventional_tools: metal ruler wrapped with a rubber band for grip
opposite_tool_attributes: smooth, rounded, or wrong-size tip that cannot engage the clamp screw
short, flexible shaft that bends and cannot reach recessed clamps
slick, thin handle that provides low torque and slips when wet

tighten.task_goal: Firm up a loose kitchen cabinet pull handle
tighten.expected_outcome: The handle no longer wiggles and aligns flush with the cabinet face
required_tool_attributes: properly sized Phillips tip to match screw head
rigid shaft to prevent torsional flex
ergonomic handle for higher torque
magnetized tip to hold the screw if needed
unconventional_tools: Metal nail file (from a manicure kit)
opposite_tool_attributes: mismatched or rounded tip that cannot engage a Phillips screw head
flexible or soft shaft that twists or bends under torque
small, slippery handle that reduces grip and torque

tighten.task_goal: True a bicycle wheel by tightening a loose spoke nipple
tighten.expected_outcome: The wheel runs straighter with even spoke tension and reduced wobble
required_tool_attributes: correct slot size to fit spoke nipples
hardened, rigid jaws to prevent rounding
compact form for access between spokes
textured exterior for positive grip
unconventional_tools: mini adjustable crescent wrench with narrow jaws
precision flathead jeweler’s screwdriver used in the nipple’s slot from the rim bed
opposite_tool_attributes: incorrect or rounded slot that cannot capture nipple flats
soft, flexible, non-hardened jaws that deform under torque
bulky form factor that cannot fit between spokes and a smooth exterior that slips in the hand

tighten.task_goal: Tighten a mason jar ring during home canning
tighten.expected_outcome: The ring is snug to hold the lid in place for proper sealing during processing
required_tool_attributes: adjustable strap or jaws to conform to lid diameter
high-friction rubber surface for grip
rigid handle to apply torque
comfortable grip to prevent slippage with wet hands
unconventional_tools: silicone-tipped kitchen tongs (use as a clamp to twist the ring)
nylon dog leash + wooden spoon handle (loop as a makeshift strap wrench for gentle torque)
automotive oil filter strap wrench (rubber strap with a rigid handle)
opposite_tool_attributes: non-adjustable, fixed-diameter opening that cannot conform to different lid sizes
smooth, low-friction contact surfaces (e.g., polished metal/plastic) with no rubber grip
flexible or stretchy handle with a narrow, slippery grip that fails when wet and cannot transmit torque
